query:
SELECT
            g.name as "name!",
            COUNT(a.rowid) as "song_count!",
            0 as "album_count!",
            0 as "artist_count!",
            0 as "total_duration!"
           FROM genrez g
           LEFT JOIN albumz a ON a.genre_rowid = g.rowid AND a.deleted_at IS NULL
           GROUP BY g.rowid, g.name
           ORDER BY g.name ASC
